diagrams.title: Abstraction Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between abstraction levels from concrete to abstract
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the abstraction spectrum and how different levels of abstraction work together in inheritance hierarchy.

diagrams.title: Abstract Class vs Interface Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison table showing differences between abstract classes and interfaces
elements: Comparison categories: Methods, Variables, Constructors, Inheritance, Keywords
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for understanding when to use abstract class vs interface.

diagrams.title: Real-World Abstraction Example - ATM
diagrams.description: Shows how ATM abstracts banking operations from the user
elements: User View: Screen, Keypad, Cash Dispenser
Hidden Implementation: Database, Network, Security, Hardware Control
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates how abstraction is used in real applications to hide complexity from end users.

diagrams.title: Inheritance Tree for Shapes
diagrams.description: Demonstrates abstract class Shape with subclasses Circle and Rectangle
diagrams.purpose: Shows how abstract classes define common structure while interfaces define additional capabilities.
